faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about VFi Meet

questions.question: Does VFi Meet have a time limit for meetings?
questions.answer: No. VFi Meet does not limit meeting duration, even with a free account. You can host meetings or online classes for as long as you need without automatic session termination.

questions.question: Do I need to install an online meeting app?
questions.answer: No. You can join meetings directly from your web browser on computer, phone, or tablet just by opening the meeting link.

questions.question: Does VFi Meet support meeting recording?
questions.answer: Yes. VFi Meet allows you to record meetings for later review. Videos are stored on the system and you can share or grant permissions to others to view when needed.

questions.question: Do participants need an account to join a meeting room?
questions.answer: Not required. Participants can join meeting rooms using a link or room code without logging in. However, when logged in, you can access more features and manage meetings more conveniently.

questions.question: Can I use VFi Meet on phones and iPads?
questions.answer: Yes. VFi Meet works well on phones and iPads. You just need to open the meeting link in your browser and join immediately without installing additional software.

questions.question: Is VFi Meet suitable for online teaching?
questions.answer: Yes. VFi Meet is very suitable for online teaching. Teachers can organize online classes, manage students, arrange schedules, and teach directly through video, screen sharing, or whiteboard. The system also supports recording lessons for students to review later.

questions.question: Does VFi Meet support whiteboards for classes?
questions.answer: Yes. VFi Meet supports online whiteboards to help teachers present lessons, write formulas, or illustrate content right in the classroom.

questions.question: Can I organize hybrid online and offline classes?
questions.answer: Yes. VFi Meet allows organizing hybrid online and offline classes. You can share additional cameras in the classroom so online students can follow lessons and classroom activities in real-time.

questions.question: Does VFi Meet support meeting notes?
questions.answer: Yes. VFi Meet integrates AI to support meetings such as content transcription, language translation, and automatic meeting summarization, helping participants easily follow and review important content.

questions.question: How do I invite others to join a meeting?
questions.answer: You can share the meeting link, send email invitations directly from VFi Meet, or share the meeting code. Invitees just need to click the link or enter the code to join.
